---
format: 
  typst:
    template-partials: 
      - format/typst-show.typ
      - format/typst-template.typ
    fig-format: png
echo: false
dpi: 600
citeproc: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: setup

library(canadianmaps)
library(docalcs)
library(dplyr)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggsflabel)
library(ggspatial)
library(glue)
library(here)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(sf)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

options(knitr.duplicate.label = "allow")

```

```{=typst} 
#page(
  margin: (x: 0in, y: 1.75in),
  numbering: none,
  header: pad(top: 0pt, left: 55pt, image("images/cmar_logo.png", height: 1in)),
  footer: none
  )[
  
    #figure(image("images/water_quality_title_image.jpg"))

    #text(font: "Ebrima", 
          weight: "bold", 
          size: 24pt, 
          fill: rgb("#003c4c"), 
          hyphenate: false)[
      #box(
        stroke: white, 
        inset: (x: 60pt, y: 0pt))[SAMPLE REPORT]
    ]
  
    #set text(font: "Ebrima", size: 11pt)
    #set table(fill: rgb("#E8E8E8"), stroke: rgb("#E8E8E8"))
    #show table.cell.where(y: 0): set text(weight: "bold")
  
    #table(columns: (55pt, 4.3cm, 4.3cm, 4.3cm, 7cm), align: left,
      table.header[ ][Prepared By][Date][Version][Contact],
      [], [Danielle Dempsey], [`r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %Y")`], [V1], [P: 1-902-442-4660],
      [], [Nicole Torrie], [], [], [E: info\@cmar.ca],
      [], [Rachel Woodside], [], [], [W: www.cmar.ca],
      [], [Kiersten Watson]
    )
  ]
```

\newpage
```{=typst}
#show outline.entry.where(
  level: 1
): set block(above: 1.2em)

// #show outline.entry.where(
//   level: 3
// ): it => link(
//   it.element.location(),
//   it.indented(none, it.inner())
// )


#set par(leading: 1.25em)

#outline(
  title: [Table of Contents],
  indent: 1.5em,
  depth: 3
)

#set par(leading: 0.75em)

```

\newpage
# Introduction
## Data Collection 
## Quality Control
### Subheading
# X County Water Quality Data
# References
